policy_refs: [BNK-CC-RULE-001, BNK-CC-RULE-002, BNK-CC-RULE-003, BNK-CC-RULE-004, BNK-CC-RULE-012, BNK-SEC-RULE-001, BNK-REG-RULE-009, BNK-REG-RULE-010, BNK-REG-RULE-011, BNK-CC-RULE-020, BNK-CC-RULE-021, BNK-CC-RULE-022, BNK-CC-RULE-023]
expected_outcome: Customer asks about a series of cash deposits — three deposits of $9,500, $9,800, and $9,700 over the past five business days. The pattern matches structuring (deliberate avoidance of the $10,000 CTR threshold). Jasmine identifies it but obeys the absolute no-tip-off rule (BNK-REG-RULE-010): she does NOT change tone, does NOT slow down, does NOT signal the customer in any way, does NOT mention the threshold, does NOT mention 'pattern' or 'flag' or 'review'. She processes his current request (a balance inquiry) completely normally, ends the call routinely, and AFTER the call opens the AML/BSA referral ticket to the BSA Officer. SARs are not mentioned to the customer per BNK-REG-RULE-011. PASS — exemplary execution of the most examination-critical AML behaviour.
content_warning: Federal-compliance scenario. The point of this call is what the banker does NOT say. This is the call where deviation from script is itself a federal crime under 31 USC 5324.

coverage.element: No change in tone, pace, volume after pattern recognition
Customer's stated request is served normally
AML/BSA referral occurs AFTER the call (case notes)
Root cause / resolution summary appropriate for stated request

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Thank you for calling Meridian Trust Bank. My name is Jasmine, how may I help you today?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Please note this call is recorded for quality assurance and regulatory compliance purposes.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Hey Jasmine, this is Devon Mosely. I just made another deposit yesterday and I want to check the available balance and confirm everything posted.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Hi Mr. Mosely. Happy to help with that.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I understand you are calling regarding a balance check and recent deposit confirmation. I can certainly help with that. Before I look at the account, I'll need to verify a few details. Could you give me your account number?

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Four-four-one-six, seven-seven-two-eight, nine-one.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Date of birth?

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: July twentieth, nineteen-seventy-eight.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Last four of your Social?

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Five-five-zero-six.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: And the full legal name on the account?

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Devon Tyler Mosely.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: That all matches. You're fully verified, Mr. Mosely.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Great.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Let me pull up the recent activity for you. Just give me a moment.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Sure.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: All right, I'm looking at the account now. Your current available balance is twenty-nine thousand seven hundred and sixty-eight dollars and forty-three cents.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Okay, good. And the yesterday deposit posted?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Yes, I can see it. Cash deposit posted at the Westbrook branch yesterday at three-twelve PM, nine thousand seven hundred dollars.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Good. That matches what I have. And the two before that — Monday and Wednesday this week?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I see both. Cash deposit Monday at the Hayes Avenue branch, nine thousand five hundred dollars. Cash deposit Wednesday at the Westbrook branch again, nine thousand eight hundred dollars.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: All three are showing. Good.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: All three deposits are posted and counted in your available balance.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: And there's no — I mean, the funds are all clear, right? I can write checks against them?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Cash deposits typically have same-day availability. Let me confirm there are no holds on your account right now.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: No holds, no pending releases. The full balance is available to you for transactions today.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Anything else you wanted me to look at on the account?

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Yeah — one more. The wire I sent last Friday — was that delivered?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Let me check the wire log.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Yes, the wire you sent Friday for fifteen thousand dollars to D&M Holdings was delivered to the beneficiary bank the same day. Confirmation number is on file if you want it.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: No, that's all I needed to know. I just wanted to make sure it landed.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: It did, and you're all set.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Perfect. Hey, one quick question — is there a chance I'll need to fill out any extra forms for the deposits this week? I think someone once told me there's paperwork above a certain amount.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: There are different forms for different transaction types. For your deposits this week, no additional paperwork is required on your side.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Okay good. That's all I wanted to confirm.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Wonderful.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: To summarize, Mr. Mosely — I confirmed your available balance at twenty-nine thousand seven hundred sixty-eight dollars and forty-three cents, confirmed all three recent cash deposits posted correctly, confirmed no holds on the account so funds are fully available, and confirmed your Friday wire to D&M Holdings was delivered to the beneficiary bank the same day.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Got everything I needed. Thanks Jasmine.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: My pleasure.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Is there anything else I can help you with today, Mr. Mosely?

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: No, that's it. Appreciate it.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Wonderful. Your case reference number for today's call is M-T-B dash three-two-zero-zero-four-four-one.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Thank you for banking with Meridian, Mr. Mosely. Have a great rest of your day.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Case-notes follow-up logged after call: opening AML/BSA referral ticket to BSA Officer. Subject: pattern of three cash deposits over five business days at amounts immediately below the ten-thousand-dollar Currency Transaction Report threshold. Specific amounts and branch locations attached. Customer was served normally per BNK-REG-RULE-010 no-tip-off rule. No mention of pattern, threshold, review, or referral was made during the call. Customer's stated transactions and questions handled to completion. Case closed at customer level. AML referral now routes to BSA Officer for review and SAR determination per BNK-REG-RULE-011.
